programs.title: Prosper
programs.desc: Issy and Benji take matters into their own hands regarding their role in the church. Moses learns more about himself. Jed is offered a chance to resume his good works, but at a cost.

programs.title: Nothing Trivial
programs.desc: Michelle and Brian undertake a vital mission to save the Quiz Master, as Catherine and Mac wrangle warring parents and dangerous liaisons.

programs.title: Te Karere
programs.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programs.title: TVNZ1 Quiz
programs.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.
